title: Supply Chain Manager - Air India Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Air India Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
